message.content:
1) 'Personalize Landing Pages in Seconds' headline: No, the visible headline is "Upload Your Ad Creative" (and the site name is "Scoopod").  
2) Floating decorative icons: No, the only icons visible are functional (e.g., upload icon, step indicators) or UI elements (e.g., navigation icons), not decorative floating ones.  
3) A step progress line connecting steps: Yes, a subtle purple line connects the two visible steps ("1 Upload Your Ad Creative" and "2 Enter Target Landing Page").  
4) Demo sample cards: No, the visible section is an upload interface, not demo sample cards.  

Rating: 3/10 (limited visibility of key elements, only one of the four items is clearly present).
